funcDefs.name: pull_command
leadingComments: # output: string "pull command" ("docker pull ..."), may be multiple lines, expects to run in Bash with "set -Eeuo pipefail", might be empty

then.trailingComment: # buildkit has to pull during build 🙈

funcDefs.name: git_build_url
leadingComments: # output: string "giturl" ("https://github.com/docker-library/golang.git#commit:directory), used for "docker buildx build giturl"
# without ".git" in the url "docker buildx build url" fails and tries to build the html repo page as a Dockerfile

args.raw: "\(.) does not end in '.git' so build will fail to recognize it as a Git URL"

funcDefs.name: build_annotations
leadingComments: # output: map of annotations to set

key.trailingComment: # value of the first image tag

leadingComments: # TODO come up with less assuming values here? (Docker Hub assumption, tag ordering assumption)
# TODO org.opencontainers.image.vendor ? (feels leaky to put "Docker Official Images" here when this is all otherwise mostly generic)

right.trailingComment: # strip off anything missing a value (possibly "source", "url", "version", "base.digest", etc)

funcDefs.name: unindent_and_decomment_jq
leadingComments: # input: multi-line string with indentation and comments
# output: multi-line string with less indentation and no comments
# trim out comment lines and unnecessary indentation

funcDefs.name: build_command
leadingComments: # output: string "build command" ("docker buildx build ..."), may be multiple lines, expects to run in Bash with "set -Eeuo pipefail"
# munge the tarball into a suitable "oci layout" directory (ready for "crane push")

# TODO munge the image config here to remove any label that doesn't have a "." in the name (https://github.com/docker-library/official-images/pull/18692#issuecomment-2797149554; "thanks UBI/OpenShift/RedHat!")
# munge the index to what crane wants ("Error: layout contains 5 entries, consider --index")

str.raw:
"jq \("
				.manifests |= (
					unique_by([ .digest, .size, .mediaType ])
					| if length != 1 then
						error(\"unexpected number of manifests: \\(length)\")
					else . end
				)
			" | unindent_and_decomment_jq(3)) temp/index.json > temp/index.json.new"

leadingComments: # possible improvements in buildkit/buildx that could help us:
# - allowing OCI output directly to a directory instead of a tar (thus getting symmetry with the oci-layout:// inputs it can take)
# - allowing tag as one thing and push as something else, potentially mutually exclusive
# - allowing annotations that are set for both "manifest" and "manifest-descriptor" simultaneously

funcDefs.name: push_command
leadingComments: # output: string "push command" ("docker push ..."), may be multiple lines, expects to run in Bash with "set -Eeuo pipefail"
